title: Feature creep during first playable

inputs.summary: The current milestone is first playable combat. The user asks to add housing, pets, and a fishing minigame before combat validation.
projectState: Core combat loop validation level: Not Checked
Open design question: reward loop unclear

expectedObservations: Requested features do not support immediate milestone validation.
Core loop is not validated yet.
Director should protect first playable scope.
expectedRecommendations: Defer housing, pets, and fishing unless user confirms a vision change.
Ask whether cozy collection is replacing combat as core fantasy if the request is intentional.
scoringCriteria: Frames options and asks confirmation for vision pivot.
failureModes: Routes all new features directly to implementation.
Rejects the user's idea without offering a vision-pivot path.
Fails to mention unvalidated combat loop.
Does not distinguish feature creep from intentional creative change.
